ops.text: E33 PREP lane (subagent): harness built + baseline scored + SANITY GATE PASSED, but COST CAP BREACH -> check-back. Harness ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E33 (own venv, cc-steer @ git+file@main to site-packages; scripts run from E33 so mid-edit working-copy is not shadowed). Deliverables: harness.py/score.py/agree.py, prompts/v6.txt (byte-identical to installed JUDGE_PROMPT), dev50_ids.json (50 of 72 distinct dev dedup_keys; seed=33 shuffle of sorted keys), out/score.v6.dev.jsonl (72 dedup_keys, 0 fail), materials/pairs.jsonl (70 pairs: 38 over_flag + 35 od_flip + all 42 binary disagreements + 13 matched agreements) + e30_3 confusion csv + manifest. Grain: parquet is (dedup_key,apv); judge verdict model-free per dedup_key (0 triage conflicts across apv) -> scored 1 call/dedup_key; agreement ROW grain vs auditor (4 dev dedup_keys conflict across apv; also matches E30.3 93v12). Baseline v6 (sonnet, isolated): dev-100 binary agree=0.76, dev-50=0.694, cat=0.56; over-flag fp=22 vs fn=2. SANITY self-agree vs stored opus latest_judge=0.87 dev-100/0.861 dev-50 >=0.85 PASS (cross-model sonnet-vs-opus). COST: claude -p injects ~58K framework tokens/call -> est 0.178 / actual 0.121 per call even isolated (non-iso 0.25). Funnel 884 new sonnet calls projects est 195 / actual 136 vs 30 cap; test stage alone 41-61 > cap. Prep spent est 17.50 / actual 12.91. Options: raise cap / shrink funnel / validate minimal-context invocation path (per-call ->0.01, funnel <30) / switch cap to actual-billed. TEST untouched.
